title: Subtraction
summary: Subtraction describes removal, comparison, or difference between quantities.
claim: Subtraction describes the removal of a quantity from another quantity, or the difference between two quantities.
proof: Subtraction is inverse to addition: if a + b = c, then c − a = b and c − b = a within the same arithmetic context.
validation: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
reconstruction: Can be rediscovered by removing objects from a collection or comparing two collections by pairing objects.
